frameworks.name: visual metacognition
frameworks.one_line: field-level inquiry into how observers monitor and report visual processing

frameworks.name: consensus science
frameworks.one_line: community process for identifying shared long-term research goals

core_question: What long- and medium-term goals should the visual-metacognition field collectively prioritize?
key_assumptions: psychology trails more mature sciences in identifying key questions
shared goals can accelerate progress and synergy across labs
interpretations: 26 researchers reached consensus on four long-term and two medium-term common goals
consensus-building around shared goals could be adopted more widely in psychological science
limitations_noted: success of the effort can only be evaluated in the following few years
